description_long: This is a large commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage, swept-back low-mounted wings, and prominent winglets at the tips. The aircraft features two sizable turbofan engines mounted beneath the wings, and a conventional tail assembly with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The livery is primarily white with blue accents, and the tail fin displays a bold '787' marking, indicating it is a Boeing 787 Dreamliner. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows providing visibility for the flight crew. The landing gear is in a tricycle configuration, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear beneath the cockpit. The overall design is sleek and modern, optimized for long-distance passenger transport.
description: A modern, white and blue commercial jet airliner with swept-back wings, underwing engines, and a prominent '787' tail marking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, and the full span of the swept-back wings with underwing engines.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fuselage, cockpit, wing profile, underwing engine, and the '787' marking on the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the full wingspan with visible winglets.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the opposite engine, fuselage, and tail details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
